name: Text
description: Paragraph text with size, color, weight props.

api.name: Text
api.description: Paragraph text with size, color, weight props.

parameters.name: LineClamp
parameters.description: Clamp the text to a fixed number of lines via Tailwind's line-clamp-N. Supported range is 1–3 (the utilities shipped in the prebuilt Lumeo CSS bundle); values outside that range are ignored. Multi-line counterpart to Truncate, which clips to a single line. When both are set, Truncate wins (single-line ellipsis).

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<Text Size="xs">Extra small text</Text>
<Text Size="sm">Small text</Text>
<Text>Default text</Text>
<Text Size="lg">Large text</Text>
<Text Size="xl">Extra large text</Text>

examples.title: Truncation
examples.code:
<Container MaxWidth="xs">
    <Text Truncate="true">This is a very long piece of text that will be truncated...</Text>
</Container>

mdSummary:
# Text

Paragraph text with size, color, weight props.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Typography
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/text

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Text | Size | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | Weight | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | As | `string` | `"p"` |  |
| Text | Leading | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | Truncate | `bool` | `` |  |
| Text | LineClamp | `int?` | `` | Clamp the text to a fixed number of lines via Tailwind's line-clamp-N. Supported range is 1–3 (the utilities shipped in the prebuilt Lumeo CSS bundle); values outside that range are ignored. Multi-line counterpart to Truncate, which clips to a single line. When both are set, Truncate wins (single-line ellipsis). |
| Text | Align | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Text | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Text | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Text) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Text />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`

## Files
- `UI/Text/Text.razor`
